title: jasminum brachyscyphum
intro: Jasminum brachyscyphum, also known as the Short-bracted Jasmine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleaceae. The plant is traditionally used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum brachyscyphum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
